violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to wash, rinse, and sanitize in 3-bay sink until the dishwashing machine is able to reach the proper chlorine sanitizer concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Establishment is to resurface or replace cutting boards. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2024
The sink used for food preparation was observed leaking. Establishment is to fix leaking pipe at the food preparation sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024
The freezer units in the basement were observed iced over. Establishment is to run a defrost cycle on the basement freezers. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
